content:
📜 Each weekly performance challenge now includes:
✔ A “Handicap Option” – Students may voluntarily take a challenge at reduced difficulty but receive a partial XP reward.
✔ A “Refusal Penalty” – If a student refuses to participate, they must complete an alternative analytical assignment with a built-in disadvantage.
✔ A “Failure Consequence” – If they perform but fail, they receive a minor debuff affecting a future skill check.

Example: Week 9 – Existentialism & The Power of the Monologue

📜 Performance Challenge: “The Speech That Defines You”
✔ Level 1 (Basic Challenge): Memorize and recite a passage from No Exit (Sartre).
✔ Level 2 (Advanced Challenge): Deliver a memorized soliloquy from a postmodernist text, adapting it into a contemporary style.
✔ Level 3 (Master Challenge): Perform an original existential monologue from the perspective of a fictional or real historical figure.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 242 (chunk 242/555)
